definition:
ὀρέγω 
 [in Sm.: Job.8:20, Eze.16:49 * ;] 
to reach, stretch out; pass. and mid., to stretch oneself out, reach forth; metaphorically, to reach after, grasp at, aspire to: with genitive of thing(s), 1Ti.3:1, Heb.11:16; φιλαργυρίας (see Ellic. and CGT, in l), 1Ti.6:10.†
 SYN.: ἐπιθυμέω, to desire (which see)  (AS)
